title: Elections 2026 LIVE: Modi to address 3 rallies in Bengal; TMC says BJP wants to 'erase India's diversity'
description: Elections 2026 LIVE: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is set to address three rallies in poll-bound West Bengal on Saturday. Meanwhile, the ruling Trinamool Congress (TMC) criticised the BJP’s plan to introduce the Uniform Civil Code (UCC) in Bengal, saying it would weaken India’s diversity.
